question:
In the intercuspal position, the lingual cusp of
maxillary 2nd premolar contacts the:

options.C: Distal marginal ridge of mandibular 2nd molar
options.D: Distal marginal ridge of mandibular 1st premolar

My Answer Choice: C To provide an accurate response regarding tooth contact patterns,
